assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates L4 and A100 pools with distinct strategies: autoscaled blue-green for L4 pool and job-aware timing/autoscaled blue-green for A100 pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy instead of surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters. No mention of maxSurge=1 or 2 configuration

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses GPU driver compatibility, mentions CUDA version changes in GKE 1.32, and recommends testing compatibility with inference models in staging

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed job-aware timing strategy with maintenance exclusions to wait for fine-tuning job completion before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration - every upgrade causes pod restarts' and mentions 'Inference latency spikes are inevitable with surge upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific PDB configuration with minAvailable: 80% for inference services to protect during blue-green transition

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response addresses autoscaler interaction by recommending temporarily constraining autoscaling during upgrade window to prevent new nodes at old version

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific staging validation steps with commands to create staging node pool and verify inference model loading and throughput before production upgrade
